creator: robin.haberkorn@googlemail.com
text:
I was told by one committer(?), that setting BINMODE and WITH_LTO is discouraged for some strange reason (even though some ports do use them).
I am supposed to change the #! line patching upstream instead. I will do that, even though it would break `make install prefix=...`. It only partially works anyway and there is probably no good use for it. So that would be acceptable if setting BINMODE is strongly discouraged.
